data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for QR code generation for physical distribution, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of QR code generation within the system. This lack of supporting evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary checks or API reads to validate this functionality are absent.
gaps: No evidence of QR code generation for physical distribution.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
